entry.title: IDC W91CRB17D0009 (P00019) awarded to ENGINEERING RESEARCH AND CONSULTING, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: RESEARCH AND DEVELOPMENT IN THE PHYSICAL, ENGINEERING, AND LIFE SCIENCES (EXCEPT BIOTECHNOLOGY)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:extentCompeted.description: FULL AND OPEN COMPETITION AFTER EXCLUSION OF SOURCES

entry.title: IDC W91CRB17D0009 (P00021) awarded to ENGINEERING RESEARCH AND CONSULTING, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO EXTEND THE DELIVERY DATE UNDER FAR CLAUSE 52.216-22 FROM 19 JUNE 2024 TO 19 JUNE 2025. THIS WILL ALLOW FOR DELIVERY OF MATERIALS AND EQUIPMENT THAT HAVE ALREADY BEEN PURCHASED TO BE RECEIVED AND INVOICED.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: RESEARCH AND DEVELOPMENT IN THE PHYSICAL, ENGINEERING, AND LIFE SCIENCES (EXCEPT BIOTECHNOLOGY)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:extentCompeted.description: FULL AND OPEN COMPETITION AFTER EXCLUSION OF SOURCES
